provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male in full medieval plate armor with chainmail, a heraldic tabard, a broadsword and kite shield, standing in front of a castle wall, the armor is polished silver with gold trim and enamel inlays, a plumed helmet under one arm, he looks like he belongs at a Renaissance faire not on a spaceship

judgment.explanation: Full medieval plate armor, heraldic tabard, broadsword and shield. Fantasy not sci-fi. Violates every art pillar.
